name: proc_creation_win_regasm_regsvcs_uncommon_location_execution
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\Regsvcs.exe", "*\\Regasm.exe")) or (process.pe.original_file_name like~ ("RegSvcs.exe", "RegAsm.exe"))) and (process.command_line like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\*", "*\\PerfLogs\\*", "*\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*"))
